label: Koncept Exhibition Quotations
description: Koncept pricing catalog, RAG view, and customer quotation layout.

default_quote_basis.surfaces: Confirm: Please confirm visible walls, fascia, arches, beams, columns, and painted finishes.
default_quote_basis.counters: Confirm: Please confirm counter, cabinet, and countertop material/finish.
default_quote_basis.platform: Confirm: Please confirm platform height, platform coverage, and flooring finish.
default_quote_basis.graphics: Confirm: Please confirm graphic panels, logo signage, lightboxes, and printed features.
default_quote_basis.furniture: Confirm: Please confirm furniture, plants, green walls, AV, and rental items.
default_quote_basis.electrical: Confirm: Please confirm lights, 13A sockets, special power, and organiser connection fees.

fallback_line_items.description: Vinyl graphics for fascia, panels and backdrops
